requirement_topic.en: Market Access — SONCAP Product Certificate and Per-Shipment SONCAP Certificate
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——SONCAP产品证书及每批货SONCAP证书
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——SONCAP產品證書及每批貨SONCAP證書

summary.en: Refrigerating appliances are regulated products under the SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP), Nigeria's mandatory pre-import conformity scheme run by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria. Two key documents are required: (1) a Product Certificate (PC) — issued after the product model demonstrates conformity to the applicable NIS/IEC standards (IEC 60335-2-24 safety, CISPR 14 EMC, IEC 62552 energy/MEPS) via accepted test reports, and valid for a defined period or production run; and (2) a SONCAP Certificate (SC) — issued per shipment/consignment, referencing the Product Certificate, and required for customs clearance at Nigerian ports. Goods arriving without a valid SONCAP Certificate face detention, destination inspection, demurrage, re-export, or rejection. SONCAP is administered through SON-appointed licensed certification bodies/agents that issue the PC and SC after document and (where required) inspection checks.
summary.zh: 制冷器具属于SON符合性评定计划（SONCAP）下的受监管产品，该计划是由尼日利亚标准组织运行的强制性进口前符合性制度。须取得两项关键文件：（1）产品证书（PC）——在产品型号通过被接受的检测报告证明符合适用NIS/IEC标准（IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14 EMC、IEC 62552能效/MEPS）后签发，在规定期限或生产批次内有效；（2）SONCAP证书（SC）——按每批货/每票货签发，引用产品证书，为尼日利亚港口清关所必需。无有效SONCAP证书抵港的货物将面临扣留、目的地查验、滞期、退运或拒收。SONCAP通过SON指定的持牌认证机构/代理执行，在完成文件审核及（必要时）查验后签发PC及SC。
summary.zht: 製冷器具屬於SON符合性評定計畫（SONCAP）下的受監管產品，該計畫是由奈及利亞標準組織運行的強制性進口前符合性制度。須取得兩項關鍵文件：（1）產品證書（PC）——在產品型號通過被接受的檢測報告證明符合適用NIS/IEC標準（IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14 EMC、IEC 62552能效/MEPS）後簽發，在規定期限或生產批次內有效；（2）SONCAP證書（SC）——按每批貨/每票貨簽發，引用產品證書，為奈及利亞港口清關所必需。無有效SONCAP證書抵港的貨物將面臨扣留、目的地查驗、滯期、退運或拒收。SONCAP通過SON指定的持牌認證機構/代理執行，在完成文件審核及（必要時）查驗後簽發PC及SC。

standards_or_laws: SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) — mandatory pre-import conformity scheme of the Standards Organisation of Nigeria
SONCAP Product Certificate (PC) and per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (SC) — required documents for import clearance
Standards Organisation of Nigeria Act — legal basis for SON standards enforcement and conformity assessment

summary.en: China's analogous market-entry control for refrigerators is the China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) mark, administered by SAMR/CNCA and issued by designated certification bodies based on GB 4706.13 (safety) and GB 4343.1 (EMC) testing plus factory inspection. CCC is a domestic placing-on-market control: a product-level certification with a factory surveillance regime, not a per-shipment export document. There is no Chinese equivalent of a per-consignment SONCAP Certificate; CCC governs sale within China only. A Chinese CCC certificate does not satisfy SONCAP and cannot be used to clear goods at Nigerian ports — SON requires its own PC and SC.
summary.zh: 中国对冰箱的类似市场准入管控是中国强制认证（CCC / 3C）标志，由SAMR/CNCA管理，并由指定认证机构基于GB 4706.13（安全）及GB 4343.1（EMC）测试加工厂检查签发。CCC属于国内投放市场管控：为产品级认证并配以工厂监督制度，而非每批货的出口文件。中国并无每票货SONCAP证书的对应物；CCC仅管控中国境内销售。中国CCC证书不满足SONCAP，不能用于在尼日利亚港口清关——SON要求其自身的PC及SC。
summary.zht: 中國對冰箱的類似市場准入管控是中國強制認證（CCC / 3C）標誌，由SAMR/CNCA管理，並由指定認證機構基於GB 4706.13（安全）及GB 4343.1（EMC）測試加工廠檢查簽發。CCC屬於國內投放市場管控：為產品級認證並配以工廠監督制度，而非每批貨的出口文件。中國並無每票貨SONCAP證書的對應物；CCC僅管控中國境內銷售。中國CCC證書不滿足SONCAP，不能用於在奈及利亞港口清關——SON要求其自身的PC及SC。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) — mandatory product certification administered by SAMR/CNCA
GB 4706.13-2014 and GB 4343.1 — standards underpinning CCC for refrigerators (safety and EMC)
CCC factory inspection / surveillance regime — domestic placing-on-market control (no per-shipment export certificate)

gap.en: A Chinese CCC certificate provides no clearance route into Nigeria. Exporters must: (1) engage a SON-licensed certification body and route the model through SONCAP to obtain a Product Certificate, supported by test reports covering safety (IEC 60335-2-24), EMC (CISPR 14), and energy/MEPS (IEC 62552); (2) for every consignment, apply for a SONCAP Certificate before shipment or before arrival, referencing the PC, commercial invoice, and packing details; (3) plan lead time — the per-shipment SC must be in hand for customs at Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne, or the goods risk detention, destination inspection, demurrage, or re-export; (4) keep the PC valid and matched to the exact model/SKU on each invoice — mismatches between the certified model and the shipped model are a common cause of SONCAP rejection. Unlike CCC (one domestic certificate), SONCAP imposes recurring per-shipment paperwork that must be budgeted into every order.
gap.zh: 中国CCC证书不提供进入尼日利亚的清关途径。出口商须：（1）委聘SON持牌认证机构，将型号经SONCAP取得产品证书，并以涵盖安全（IEC 60335-2-24）、EMC（CISPR 14）及能效/MEPS（IEC 62552）的检测报告为支撑；（2）每票货均须在发运前或抵港前申请SONCAP证书，引用PC、商业发票及装箱明细；（3）规划交期——每批货的SC须在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奥内清关时在手，否则货物可能被扣留、目的地查验、滞期或退运；（4）保持PC有效并与每张发票上的确切型号/SKU一致——已认证型号与发运型号不符是SONCAP被拒的常见原因。与CCC（一份国内证书）不同，SONCAP施加每票货反复的文书工作，须计入每笔订单成本。
gap.zht: 中國CCC證書不提供進入奈及利亞的清關途徑。出口商須：（1）委聘SON持牌認證機構，將型號經SONCAP取得產品證書，並以涵蓋安全（IEC 60335-2-24）、EMC（CISPR 14）及能效/MEPS（IEC 62552）的檢測報告為支撐；（2）每票貨均須在發運前或抵港前申請SONCAP證書，引用PC、商業發票及裝箱明細；（3）規劃交期——每批貨的SC須在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奧內清關時在手，否則貨物可能被扣留、目的地查驗、滯期或退運；（4）保持PC有效並與每張發票上的確切型號/SKU一致——已認證型號與發運型號不符是SONCAP被拒的常見原因。與CCC（一份國內證書）不同，SONCAP施加每票貨反覆的文書工作，須計入每筆訂單成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SONCAP Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate required for customs clearance; goods without a valid SC face detention, inspection, demurrage, or re-export
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC / 3C certification required for domestic sale; administered by SAMR/CNCA (no per-shipment export certificate)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SONCAP is mandatory for refrigerators: a Product Certificate (model-level, via accepted test reports) plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate are required for customs clearance at Lagos or Onne. Chinese CCC does not satisfy SONCAP and cannot clear goods. Exporters must budget recurring per-consignment certification and keep the PC matched to the exact shipped model to avoid detention and demurrage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SONCAP对冰箱为强制性：在拉各斯或奥内清关须取得产品证书（型号级，凭被接受的检测报告）及每批货的SONCAP证书。中国CCC不满足SONCAP，不能清关。出口商须将每票货反复的认证计入成本，并保持PC与确切发运型号一致，以避免扣留及滞期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SONCAP對冰箱為強制性：在拉各斯或奧內清關須取得產品證書（型號級，憑被接受的檢測報告）及每批貨的SONCAP證書。中國CCC不滿足SONCAP，不能清關。出口商須將每票貨反覆的認證計入成本，並保持PC與確切發運型號一致，以避免扣留及滯期。

requirement_topic.en: Market Access — In-Country Nigerian Importer / Consignee and Product Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——境内尼日利亚进口商/收货人及产品登记
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——境內奈及利亞進口商/收貨人及產品登記

summary.en: Importation of refrigerating appliances into Nigeria must be carried out through a registered in-country Nigerian importer/consignee. The foreign manufacturer/exporter generally cannot clear goods directly; a Nigerian-registered importer (with a Tax Identification Number and the relevant import documentation, including Form M processed through an authorised dealer bank and a Pre-Arrival Assessment Report / PAAR via the Nigeria Customs Service) is required for the consignment. The importer is the party of record for customs clearance, holds or is named on import documentation, and is typically the consignee on the SONCAP Certificate. The product/SONCAP and import documentation chain (Form M, SONCAP PC and SC, commercial invoice, bill of lading) must be consistent in importer identity, product description, and HS code for clearance at Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne.
summary.zh: 制冷器具进口至尼日利亚须通过已登记的境内尼日利亚进口商/收货人办理。外国制造商/出口商通常不能直接清关；该批货须由尼日利亚登记进口商（具备税号及相关进口单证，包括经授权交易银行办理的Form M及经尼日利亚海关署出具的到货前评估报告/PAAR）办理。进口商为清关的记录方，持有或被列名于进口单证，并通常为SONCAP证书上的收货人。产品/SONCAP及进口单证链（Form M、SONCAP PC及SC、商业发票、提单）在进口商身份、产品描述及HS编码上须一致，方可在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奥内清关。
summary.zht: 製冷器具進口至奈及利亞須通過已登記的境內奈及利亞進口商/收貨人辦理。外國製造商/出口商通常不能直接清關；該批貨須由奈及利亞登記進口商（具備稅號及相關進口單證，包括經授權交易銀行辦理的Form M及經奈及利亞海關署出具的到貨前評估報告/PAAR）辦理。進口商為清關的記錄方，持有或被列名於進口單證，並通常為SONCAP證書上的收貨人。產品/SONCAP及進口單證鏈（Form M、SONCAP PC及SC、商業發票、提單）在進口商身份、產品描述及HS編碼上須一致，方可在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奧內清關。

standards_or_laws: Nigeria Customs Service import procedures — Form M (via authorised dealer bank) and Pre-Arrival Assessment Report (PAAR)
SONCAP consignee/importer requirement — the SONCAP Certificate is issued to a Nigerian-registered importer/consignee
Federal Inland Revenue Service (FIRS) Tax Identification Number (TIN) — required registration for the importer of record

summary.en: In China, placing a domestically produced refrigerator on the home market does not require a separate in-country importer — the manufacturer holds the CCC certificate and sells directly or through domestic distributors. There is no Form M, PAAR, or per-shipment consignee-of-record requirement for domestic sales. The concept of an in-country registered importer who is the party of record for customs clearance is specific to cross-border importation into Nigeria and has no domestic Chinese equivalent for a China-made product sold in China. For Chinese exporters this means the importer-of-record function must be newly arranged in Nigeria, separate from any existing Chinese distribution relationship.
summary.zh: 在中国，将国产冰箱投放本国市场无需单独的境内进口商——制造商持有CCC证书并直接或通过国内经销商销售。国内销售无Form M、PAAR或每批货收货记录方的要求。作为清关记录方的境内登记进口商这一概念，专属于跨境进口至尼日利亚，对在中国销售的中国制造产品并无国内对应物。对中国出口商而言，这意味着进口记录方职能须在尼日利亚重新安排，与既有任何中国分销关系相互独立。
summary.zht: 在中國，將國產冰箱投放本國市場無需單獨的境內進口商——製造商持有CCC證書並直接或通過國內經銷商銷售。國內銷售無Form M、PAAR或每批貨收貨記錄方的要求。作為清關記錄方的境內登記進口商這一概念，專屬於跨境進口至奈及利亞，對在中國銷售的中國製造產品並無國內對應物。對中國出口商而言，這意味著進口記錄方職能須在奈及利亞重新安排，與既有任何中國分銷關係相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: China domestic sale model — manufacturer holds CCC certificate; no in-country importer-of-record required for home-market placement
No Chinese domestic equivalent of Form M / PAAR / per-shipment consignee requirement for China-made goods sold in China

gap.en: Chinese exporters must establish the Nigerian importer/consignee function before goods can clear: (1) appoint or contract a Nigerian-registered importer of record with a valid TIN, who opens Form M through an authorised dealer bank and obtains the PAAR from the Nigeria Customs Service; (2) ensure the SONCAP Certificate is issued to that importer/consignee and that importer identity is consistent across Form M, SONCAP, invoice, and bill of lading; (3) align HS code and product description across all documents to avoid clearance disputes; (4) recognise that without a credible in-country importer there is no lawful clearance route, even with a valid SONCAP PC and SC. Practical risk: appointing an unprepared importer, or document inconsistencies (importer name, product description, HS code) between the SONCAP chain and the Form M/PAAR chain, are frequent causes of port detention and demurrage at Lagos or Onne.
gap.zh: 中国出口商在货物清关前须建立尼日利亚进口商/收货人职能：（1）委任或签约具备有效税号的尼日利亚登记进口记录方，由其通过授权交易银行开立Form M并向尼日利亚海关署取得PAAR；（2）确保SONCAP证书签发予该进口商/收货人，且进口商身份在Form M、SONCAP、发票及提单间一致；（3）使HS编码及产品描述在所有单证间一致，以避免清关争议；（4）认识到若无可信的境内进口商，即便持有有效SONCAP PC及SC，亦无合法清关途径。实务风险：委任准备不足的进口商，或SONCAP链与Form M/PAAR链之间的单证不一致（进口商名称、产品描述、HS编码），是拉各斯或奥内港口扣留及滞期的常见原因。
gap.zht: 中國出口商在貨物清關前須建立奈及利亞進口商/收貨人職能：（1）委任或簽約具備有效稅號的奈及利亞登記進口記錄方，由其通過授權交易銀行開立Form M並向奈及利亞海關署取得PAAR；（2）確保SONCAP證書簽發予該進口商/收貨人，且進口商身份在Form M、SONCAP、發票及提單間一致；（3）使HS編碼及產品描述在所有單證間一致，以避免清關爭議；（4）認識到若無可信的境內進口商，即便持有有效SONCAP PC及SC，亦無合法清關途徑。實務風險：委任準備不足的進口商，或SONCAP鏈與Form M/PAAR鏈之間的單證不一致（進口商名稱、產品描述、HS編碼），是拉各斯或奧內港口扣留及滯期的常見原因。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Nigerian-registered importer/consignee of record (TIN, Form M, PAAR) is required to clear refrigerating appliances; the SONCAP Certificate is issued to that importer/consignee
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for domestic sale — no in-country importer-of-record required for China-made refrigerators placed on the Chinese market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Nigerian in-country importer/consignee of record (with TIN, Form M, and PAAR) is required to clear refrigerating appliances, and the SONCAP Certificate is issued to that importer. This function has no domestic Chinese equivalent and must be newly arranged. Importer identity, product description, and HS code must be consistent across the SONCAP and Form M/PAAR document chains to avoid detention and demurrage at Lagos or Onne.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 清关制冷器具须有尼日利亚境内进口商/收货记录方（具备税号、Form M及PAAR），且SONCAP证书签发予该进口商。此职能在中国并无国内对应物，须重新安排。进口商身份、产品描述及HS编码须在SONCAP与Form M/PAAR单证链间一致，以避免在拉各斯或奥内扣留及滞期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 清關製冷器具須有奈及利亞境內進口商/收貨記錄方（具備稅號、Form M及PAAR），且SONCAP證書簽發予該進口商。此職能在中國並無國內對應物，須重新安排。進口商身份、產品描述及HS編碼須在SONCAP與Form M/PAAR單證鏈間一致，以避免在拉各斯或奧內扣留及滯期。
